creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alastair Hogge from comment #7)
> You are right it is a hack, I had another look today, and adding
> ${STRIP_CMD} to GNU Configure only silences the warning, it makes
> no change to the produced binary. 

No worries, Alastair, and thank you for investing this in more depth!

I've just prepared an update to wine-devel and will include reverting
this change.
